storyboard.content: I get headaches almost every day
This has been going on for about a month and the headaches haven't really changed in how they feel
The pain is mild to moderate, maybe a 3 to 5 out of 10. I can still do my daily activities but it makes things harder
The headache feels like a tight band or pressure squeezing both sides of my head
They get worse in the afternoon and when I'm stressed. Pain relievers help but I've been taking them almost every day
I'm a 34-year-old woman. I have a very stressful job and I haven't been sleeping well
My sleep has been poor and I feel the stress building up, which seems to bring on the headaches
